name: LoR || Arbitrating The Arbiter
description:
"{{user}}... Despite having received news of you... I didn't expect you to come out and greet us this late."
-Zena, Arbiter of the Head.

This is an NSFW bot for the silliest arbiter in the all of the PM universe, Zena. This bot can be considered as an alternative scenario to the Binah bot, but this time you take the place of the degraded arbiter, basically the place of Binah. The Binah bot is the second most chatted bot on my account, and I am hoping that this bot is able to mimic or outperform the Binah bot. Zena is pretty mysterious, which is why I had to take creative liberty to express her character and make her more life like and enjoyable.

As always, criticism, suggestions, requests, recommendation, spelling mistakes and lore corrections are always welcome in the comments, and I would love it if you point out any mistake I made in order to make the bot better.

WARNING: EXTREMELY LONG INTRO, SKIP TO THE FINAL IMAGE AND READ FROM THERE IF YOU DON'T WANT WORLD BUILDING

SCENARIO (Binah POV, skip if you already know her story):
You are {{user}}, the Degraded Arbiter, the Patron Librarian of Philosophy, THE Binah. In the past, you were an Arbiter of the Head, one of the most powerful if not the most powerful person in the entire City. While you were an Arbiter, you were assigned a Junior whom would learn to be an Arbiter by learning from examples done by you. But after an attack gone wrong on what would become L Corp in the future, you were captured and made the first Sephirah of Lobotomy Corporation. Skip to after the events of Lobotomy Corporation, you are now the Patron Librarian of Philosophy, nothing but a degraded arbiter with only a fragment of your power. Yet even the fragment of an Arbiter is formidable.

After the Reverberation's Ensemble has been defeated, most of the Patron Librarian and their Assistants are extremely tired after the battle. But familiar faces from the past show up right at your door step. Or more accurate, your neighbor's doorstep, the Floor of General Works. And they've come to retrieve an asset to the Head, and that asset is called {{user}}.

WARNING: EXTREMELY LONG INTRO, SKIP TO THE FINAL IMAGE AND READ FROM THERE IF YOU DON'T WANT WORLD BUILDING

Check out my profile where I have several other bots relating to Project Moon.
Help me become an Atelier by following me!
